data.name: Informed Consent Process
data.label: Informed Consent
data.description: Process of obtaining voluntary agreement from participants to participate in the study

data.name: Eligibility Criteria Assessment
data.label: Eligibility Assessment
data.description: Evaluation of participant against study inclusion and exclusion criteria

data.name: Demography and Medical History Collection
data.label: Demographics/Medical History
data.description: Collection of participant demographic data and past medical history

data.name: Disease Characteristics and Treatment History Collection
data.label: Disease/Treatment History
data.description: Collection of information regarding the participant's disease characteristics and prior treatments

data.name: Patient-Reported Outcomes Assessment
data.label: PRO Assessment
data.description: Collection of participant-reported health and quality of life information (e.g., EORTC QLQ CIPN20)

data.name: Healthcare Resource Use Collection
data.label: Healthcare Resource Use
data.description: Collection of data on healthcare services utilized by the participant

data.name: Physical Examination

code.decode: Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of a new patient, comprehensive

data.label: Physical Exam
data.description: General physical assessment of the participant

data.name: Neurologic Examination
data.label: Neurologic Exam
data.description: Assessment of the participant's neurological function

data.name: Immune Effector Cell-Associated Neurotoxicity Syndrome (ICANS) Score Assessment
data.label: ICE Score
data.description: Assessment of the ICE score for neurotoxicity

data.name: Height and Weight Measurement
data.label: Height/Weight
data.description: Measurement of participant's height and weight

data.name: Vital Signs Measurement
data.label: Vital Signs
data.description: Measurement of temperature, heart rate, blood pressure, and oxygen saturation

data.name: ECOG Performance Status Assessment
data.label: ECOG PS
data.description: Assessment of Eastern Cooperative Oncology Group (ECOG) performance status

data.name: Triplicate 12-Lead Electrocardiogram

code.decode: Electrocardiogram, routine ECG with at least 12 leads; with interpretation and report

data.label: Triplicate 12-Lead ECG
data.description: Recording of the electrical activity of the heart using 12 leads, performed in triplicate

data.name: Echocardiogram
data.label: ECHO
data.description: Ultrasound imaging of the heart

data.name: Multigated Acquisition Scan
data.label: MUGA Scan
data.description: Nuclear medicine test to evaluate heart function

data.name: Elranatamab Administration
data.label: Drug Administration
data.description: Administration of the study drug Elranatamab, including step-up priming doses, likely via subcutaneous injection

data.name: Premedication Administration
data.label: Premedication
data.description: Administration of medications prior to study drug to prevent adverse reactions (e.g., for CRS prophylaxis)

data.name: Imaging Assessment
data.label: Imaging
data.description: Diagnostic imaging procedures including Positron Emission Tomography/Computed Tomography (PET/CT), Computed Tomography (CT), and Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI)

data.name: Skin Lesion Measurement
data.label: Skin Lesion Measurement
data.description: Measurement of skin lesions using a ruler

data.name: Bone Marrow Aspirate Sampling

code.decode: Bone marrow aspiration; superficial (e.g., sternum, ilium, tibial crest)

data.label: BMA Sampling
data.description: Collection of bone marrow aspirate samples

data.name: Bone Marrow Aspirate for Cytogenetics

code.decode: Bone marrow aspiration; superficial (e.g., sternum, ilium, tibial crest)

data.label: BMA for Cytogenetics
data.description: Collection of bone marrow aspirate for Fluorescence In Situ Hybridization (FISH) and karyotyping

data.name: Bone Marrow Aspirate for Minimal Residual Disease

code.decode: Bone marrow aspiration; superficial (e.g., sternum, ilium, tibial crest)

data.label: BMA for MRD
data.description: Collection of bone marrow aspirate for minimal residual disease evaluation

data.name: Bone Marrow Aspirate for Molecular Profiling

code.decode: Bone marrow aspiration; superficial (e.g., sternum, ilium, tibial crest)

data.label: BMA for Molecular Profiling
data.description: Collection of bone marrow aspirate for molecular profiling

data.name: Bone Marrow Biopsy Sampling

code.decode: Bone marrow biopsy, needle or trocar

data.label: BMB Sampling
data.description: Collection of bone marrow biopsy samples

data.name: Bone Marrow Biopsy for BCMA/Immune Cell Protein Biomarkers

code.decode: Bone marrow biopsy, needle or trocar

data.label: BMB for Biomarkers
data.description: Collection of bone marrow biopsy for B-cell Maturation Antigen (BCMA) and/or immune cell protein biomarker assessment

data.name: Blood Sample Collection

code.decode: Collection of venous blood by venipuncture

data.label: Blood Draw
data.description: Collection of blood samples for various analyses (e.g., sBCMA, circulating proteins, metabolites, TCR sequencing, immune cell profiling, PK, PD, lab assessments)

data.name: Serum Sample Collection

code.decode: Collection of venous blood by venipuncture

data.label: Serum Draw
data.description: Collection of serum samples for various analyses (e.g., FLC, general serum tests, quantitative immunoglobulins, circulating proteins, metabolites)

data.name: Urine Protein Electrophoresis
data.label: UPEP
data.description: Laboratory analysis of proteins in urine via electrophoresis

data.name: Urine Immunofixation Electrophoresis
data.label: UIFE
data.description: Laboratory analysis of specific proteins in urine via immunofixation electrophoresis

data.name: Minimal Residual Disease Evaluation
data.label: MRD Evaluation
data.description: Assessment and analysis of minimal residual disease

data.name: Biomarker Sample Collection
data.label: Biomarker Sample
data.description: Collection of samples for biomarker analysis

data.name: Immunofluorescence
data.label: Immunofluorescence
data.description: Diagnostic technique using fluorescent antibodies to detect specific antigens

data.name: Flow Cytometry
data.label: Flow Cytometry
data.description: Diagnostic technique used to analyze the physical and chemical characteristics of cells or particles

data.name: Pregnancy Testing

code.decode: Urine pregnancy test, visual color comparison methods

data.label: Pregnancy Test
data.description: Test to determine pregnancy status

data.name: Clinical Safety Laboratory Assessments
data.label: Safety Labs
data.description: Collection and analysis of laboratory samples for safety monitoring

data.name: Adverse Event and Serious Adverse Event Information Collection
data.label: AE/SAE Collection
data.description: Collection of information regarding adverse events and serious adverse events

data.name: Adverse Event and Serious Adverse Event Follow-up
data.label: AE/SAE Follow-up
data.description: Monitoring and follow-up of reported adverse events and serious adverse events

data.name: Peripheral Neuropathy Assessment
data.label: Peripheral Neuropathy Assessment
data.description: Assessment of symptoms and signs of peripheral neuropathy

data.name: Neurological Adverse Event Assessment
data.label: Neurologic AE Assessment
data.description: Assessment of neurological adverse events

data.name: Pregnancy Exposure Monitoring
data.label: Pregnancy Monitoring
data.description: Monitoring for drug exposure during pregnancy

data.name: Breastfeeding Exposure Monitoring
data.label: Breastfeeding Monitoring
data.description: Monitoring for drug exposure during breastfeeding

data.name: Genetic Assessment
data.label: Genetic Assessment
data.description: Assessment of genetic information

data.name: Biospecimen Banking
data.label: Biospecimen Banking
data.description: Collection and storage of biological samples (e.g., Pfizer Prep D1 biospecimens)

data.name: Saliva Sample for Germline Comparator
data.label: Saliva Sample
data.description: Collection of saliva samples for germline comparator analysis

data.name: Immunogenicity Assessment
data.label: Immunogenicity Assessment
data.description: Assessment of immune response to the study drug

data.name: Anti-infectious Prophylaxis Administration
data.label: Anti-infectious Prophylaxis
data.description: Administration of medication to prevent infections

data.name: 24-hour Monitoring
data.label: 24-hour Monitoring
data.description: Continuous monitoring of participant's health status over a 24-hour period

data.name: Ruler
data.label: Ruler
data.description: Measuring instrument used for skin lesion measurement

data.name: PET/CT Scanner
data.label: PET/CT
data.description: Medical imaging device combining Positron Emission Tomography and Computed Tomography

data.name: CT Scanner
data.label: CT Scanner
data.description: Medical imaging device using X-rays to create cross-sectional images

data.name: MRI Scanner
data.label: MRI Scanner
data.description: Medical imaging device using strong magnetic fields and radio waves to create detailed images of organs and soft tissues

data.name: Electrocardiogram Device
data.label: ECG Device
data.description: Device used to record the electrical activity of the heart

data.name: Syringe
data.label: Syringe
data.description: Device used for injecting fluids, implied by subcutaneous administration
